SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF TASIOS N. BOVIS IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANDONIS KORDOPATIS (STATED IN COURT W/POWER OF ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF WHO IS HIS ELDERLY UNCLE). DEFENDANT DAVIS GEORGE IS PRESENT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY KIM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DAVIS GEORGE DECLARATION TO REQUEST CHANGE OF ADDRESS IS RECEIVED AND UPDATED IN THE SYSTEM AND FILED BY COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
